bird.name: Ecuadorian thrush
bird.summary: The Ecuadorian thrush (Turdus maculirostris) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru.

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 秘鲁
locations.summary: 秘（bì）魯共和國（西班牙語：República del Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw Ripuwlika；艾馬拉語：Piruwxa Ripuwlika），通称秘魯（西班牙語：Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw；艾馬拉語：Piruw），是南…

locations.name: 通贝斯大区
locations.summary: Tumbes (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈtumbes]) is a department of Peru.

relations.subject: Ecuadorian thrush
relations.evidence: The Ecuadorian thrush is found in western Ecuador from just south of the Colombian border south through the length of the country and into far northwestern Peru's Tumbes Department
